NeuroFlow HMI — Node-RED Port
info:
## NeuroFlow HMI

This flow is a full port of the NeuroFlow HMI web application.

### Architecture
- **Sensor Tick**: Inject node fires every 1.5s → Sensor Simulator function
- **Sensor Simulator**: Stateful function that simulates robot movement, sensor drift, battery drain, zone transitions
- **Split Outputs**: Routes sensor data to gauges, chart, alert engine, and MQTT
- **Robot Command Handler**: Processes button presses (start/stop/estop/manual/reset/dock/patrol/spin/waypoint)
- **Template Handler**: Toggles automation templates (heat guard, battery return, predictive maintenance, vib shield, smart nav)
- **Flow Rule Engine**: Evaluates sensor conditions and executes action chains every 3s
- **AI Engine**: Responds to text queries about robot health, anomalies, maintenance, forecasts
- **MQTT Publisher**: Publishes sensor data to `neuroflow/sensors` every tick
- **Agent Monitor**: Updates AI agent status display every 5s

### Requirements
- node-red-dashboard (npm: node-red-dashboard)
- MQTT broker on localhost:1883 (optional)

### Installation
1. Import this JSON into Node-RED (Menu → Import)
2. Install node-red-dashboard if not present
3. Deploy and open /ui
